name: kasas
description: Full MCP access to your kasas financial ledger — accounts, transactions, labels, rules, events, sync, and market data — for charts, review, and planning in Claude Desktop.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to your self-hosted [kasas](https://github.com/paulmeier/kasas) ledger over a local, tokenless stdio transport. Claude Desktop launches the kasas binary's MCP subcommand with its bundled Node runtime, exposing every kasas read/write/admin tool as first-class tools in chat. Pair with the kasas Skills (uploaded via Settings → Capabilities) for cash-flow, spending-breakdown, net-worth, categorize, financial-review, financial-plan, and chart workflows. All money math is penny-accurate — kasas returns signed decimal strings, never floats.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List accounts with balances and currencies.

tools.name: search_transactions
tools.description: Search transactions with the kasas query language.

tools.name: create_rule
tools.description: Create a rule that labels matching transactions.

tools.name: get_market_points
tools.description: Fetch points for a market series.

kasas_binary.title: kasas binary
kasas_binary.description: Path to your kasas executable. On a Sillview-managed install this is ~/Library/Application Support/Sillview/kasas/bin/kasas.

kasas_config.title: kasas config.toml
kasas_config.description: Path to your kasas TOML config (passed as -config). It defines the SQLite database the MCP server reads. Sillview install: ~/Library/Application Support/Sillview/kasas/config.toml.
